nodes.label: Tests for Codex auth — tokens stored in Mangaba auth store (~/.mangaba/auth.json
Write Codex tokens into the Mangaba auth store.
Verify _save_codex_tokens writes only to Mangaba auth store, not ~/.codex/.
Nested error with arbitrary code still surfaces code + message.
No JSON body → generic 'with status 401' message; 401 always forces relogin.
